_comment: GuildOS harness-bootstrap manifest. Consumed by setup-agent-profile.sh. Add/remove a component (module path, MCP server, skill, or known CLI dependency) by editing this file only — no script changes needed.

harness_agent_ids._comment: Maps our harness names to the --agent identifiers accepted by `npx skills` (vercel-labs/skills AgentType union).

mcp_servers.name: guildtools
mcp_servers.description: GuildToolsServer (stdio) — guildtools_identity_register / guildtools_identity_read_profile. Each profile MUST get its own instance — never share a running process across profiles.

skills.name: cobo-agentic-wallet
skills.description: Both profiles register their own CAW wallet/identity — this skill's onboarding flow installs and configures the caw CLI.

a2a_services.name: orchestrator-a2a
a2a_services.description: Receives proactive task/delivered + feedback/request from the Specialist. Not harness-registered as an MCP tool — a plain background HTTP process; see the 'Next steps' output for the run command.

skills.name: moloch-skills
skills.description: Installs three skills covering moloch-agent CLI setup — needed for AgentFightClub launch/settle (src/shared/agentfightclub.py), Orchestrator-side only.

a2a_services.name: specialist-agent
a2a_services.description: Receives task/invite + task/send from the Orchestrator; sends proactive task/delivered + feedback/request back.

_example_external_mcp_server_NOT_A_REAL_.name: playwright
_example_external_mcp_server_NOT_A_REAL_.description: Illustrates a third-party npx-installed stdio MCP server — no guild-os files to copy for this kind. Slots directly into a profile's or shared's mcp_servers[] array.

_example_local_skill_NOT_A_REAL_COMPONEN.name: stylebook
_example_local_skill_NOT_A_REAL_COMPONEN.description: Illustrates a guild-os-authored local skill (e.g. skills/stylebook/SKILL.md), installed via install_skill_via_npx() with --copy since there's no remote to clone.
